SP AUTO campaign for Blue Lollibox (B0DJFG5ZJ7). Discovery across gift terms. Same audience as White (tween/teen 8-14).

SP EXACT keyword campaign targeting tween girls gifts for Blue Lollibox. PP +50% to show on competitor product pages when this term is searched. Proven keyword: 1665+ orders lifetime at 3.26x ROAS across campaigns. Re-enabled Feb 2026.
SP AUTO campaign for Fresh product line.

SP + SB Video defending brand term "happy lolli power shower". Hero ASIN: Fresh in Beige B0D7N2MLDP. Aggressive: TOS 500%, bid $0.50. Campaigns: FRESH-SP/PHRASE (Brand Defense), FRESH-VIDEO/PHRASE (Brand Defense).
SP Product Targeting defending Fresh product pages. Hero: Fresh in Beige B0D7N2MLDP. Targets: B0D7N2MLDP (Beige), B0D7N31M6S (Pink). PP 300%, bid $0.50. Campaign: FRESH-SP/PT (Product Defense).
SP AUTO campaign for Fresh in Pink (B0D7N31M6S). Different audience than Beige: skews 13-14 teen, college care package. Pink is the hero ASIN (478 vs 39 orders).

experiment_name: Happy Lolli - SB Store BROAD Brand Gift Discovery
description: SB Store Spotlight BROAD campaign covering all products (LolliME, Lollibox, Bottle). Targets broad gift keywords by age and occasion (gift for girls, birthday gift for tween girl, etc.). 94 orders, 2.3x ROAS since Jan 2026. Cross-product brand-level hunter.

SP + SB Video defending brand terms (lollime, lolli me). Hero ASIN selected in Seller Central. Aggressive: TOS 500%, bid $0.50. Campaigns: ME-SP/PHRASE (Brand Defense), ME-VIDEO/PHRASE (Brand Defense).

SP Product Targeting defending LolliME product pages. Hero: Mint LolliME B0F9X95K5H. Targets: B0F9X95K5H (Mint), B0F9XFXQRW (Pink), B0F9XDSVYB (Purple). PP 300%, bid $0.75. Campaign: ME-SP/PT (Product Defense).
SB Video BROAD keyword campaign for LolliME (B0F9XFXQRW). Targets category gift terms and journal keywords. Top performer: 4.02x ROAS lifetime, 2946 orders. Harvest winners into EXACT_BOOST.

SB Video EXACT keyword campaign for LolliME (B0F9XFXQRW). Proven winners harvested from BROAD Hunter campaign. Targets journal/diary keywords with organic rank potential. Lifetime: 980+ orders, 3.6x ROAS.

SP + SB Video defending brand terms (happy lolli, lollibox). Hero ASIN: White Lollibox B0C1VLXYBP. Aggressive: TOS 500%, bid $0.50. Campaigns: BOX-SP/PHRASE (Brand Defense), BOX-VIDEO/PHRASE (Brand Defense).

SP EXACT campaign for White and Purple Lollibox targeting 11 Easter gift keywords. Easter 2026 = April 5. Peak week expected Mar 22-Apr 4. Based on 2025 SQP: 462K combined SQV at peak, 14K market purchases, 10.85% market conv rate. Our ASINs got 34 conversions in peak week 2025. Seasonal campaign with planned bid scaling.

SP Product Targeting defending Lollibox product pages. Hero: White Lollibox B0C1VLXYBP. Targets: B0C1VLXYBP (White), B09XQ56RK5 (Purple), B0CR6N3WRC (Pink). PP 300%, bid $0.75. Campaign: BOX-SP/PT (Product Defense).

SB Store Spotlight BROAD by age campaign for Lollibox. Targets age-based gift keywords (girls gifts age 8-10, tween girl gifts). Top performer: 191 orders, 3.56x ROAS since Jan 2026. Evergreen birthday-occasion campaign.

SP AUTO discovery campaign for Mint LolliME (B0F9X95K5H). Originally classified as CATEGORY_CONQUEST but actual behavior is keyword discovery (0 ASIN orders, 100% keyword orders in Feb 2026). Reclassified to LOW_COST_DISCOVERY.
SP AUTO conquest campaign for Pink LolliME (B0F9XFXQRW). Pink is the biggest ME seller by ad orders (587). Same journal/diary + competitor ASIN keyword universe as Mint.
SP PHRASE keyword campaign for Pink Lollibox. 11 age-based gift keywords (8-13 year old girl gifts) in PHRASE match. Re-enabled Feb 2026. Originally created Dec 2021 via Helium 10 research.
SP AUTO conquest campaign for Purple LolliME (B0F9XDSVYB). Same journal/diary + competitor ASIN keyword universe as Mint. Purple got most impressions in the old multi-ASIN ME-AUTO.
SP AUTO campaign for Purple Lollibox (B09XQ56RK5). Discovery across gift terms. Same audience as White (tween/teen 8-14).
SP AUTO campaign for Truth Or Dare bottle. Broad discovery.

SP + SB Video defending brand term "happy lolli truth or dare". Hero ASIN: Truth Or Dare B0F4KCCSWN. Aggressive: TOS 500%, bid $0.50. Campaigns: BOTTLE-SP/PHRASE (Brand Defense), BOTTLE-VIDEO/PHRASE (Brand Defense).
SP Product Targeting defending Truth Or Dare product page. Hero: B0F4KCCSWN. Targets: B0F4KCCSWN. PP 300%, bid $0.75. Campaign: BOTTLE-SP/PT (Product Defense).
SP AUTO campaign for White Lollibox. Broad discovery across gift terms.
SP BROAD keyword campaign for White Lollibox (B0BWLHX4BK). Targets broad gift-for-girls keywords. 98 orders, 2.99x ROAS since Jan 2026. Evergreen birthday/gift-occasion hunter campaign.

experiment_name: White Lollibox - Exact Boost Teen Girl Gifts
description: SP EXACT campaign targeting teen girl gift keywords for White Lollibox (B0C1VLXYBP). TOS 500%, bid aggressive. Campaign: BOX-SP/EXACT (Teen Girl Gifts, Boost).
